content:
Seventh Day of Christmas: Big Giveaway!

♫ On the seventh day of Christmas, Katie Crafts gave to me- a giveaway with tons of goodies! ♫

Happy Sunday! I’m very excited to announce a big giveaway here on Katie Crafts! It will only last the duration of this week so get your entries in pronto- you don’t want to miss it! Jewelry, craft supplies, cards, Christmas items and more could all be yours!

The lucky winner of this giveaway will receive ALL of the following:

  • Embroidery kit to craft a “PEACE” pillow
  • Two Katie Crafts Octobot cards + envelopes
  • Two Katie Crafts Ladybot cards + envelopes
  • One sheet of Bling nail art wraps
  • Mini nail files & brush
  • Bag of assorted seed beads
  • Bag of small black glass beads
  • Bag of lavender beads
  • Pair of Katie Crafts dangle earrings (Raw Brass Charm on a 22K Gold Plated Surgical Steel Earring Hook – Hypo-Allergenic)
  • Santa ornament foam kit
  • Snowman ornament foam kit
  • Snowman foam stickers
  • Reindeer foam stickers
  • Purple iPhone lightening cable
  • One roll of snowmen duct tape
  • One roll of candy striped duct tape
  • One roll of gold duct tape
  • One Katie Crafts snowman bow

Entry is open to US residents only. Must be 18 or older to enter. All entries will be verified so if you did not follow instructions or are a bot, you will be disqualified.

On to the giveaway! Enter below!!

 
a Rafflecopter giveaway
